brands.name: Vara Juice
brands.notes: Emerging Dearborn, MI juice/smoothie QSR franchise; founded 2019, began franchising 2023 with roughly 13-19 units (mix of corporate and franchised). Young, fast-growing but unproven system.

riskFlags.title: Very new franchise system
riskFlags.detail: Began franchising only in 2023 with a small unit count (~13-19), so franchisee track record is limited and reported growth rates (cited as +325%) reflect a tiny base.

riskFlags.title: No verified Item 19 earnings disclosure
riskFlags.detail: AUV figures (~$427K) circulate via third-party aggregators but the FDD is reported to not fully disclose Item 19 financial performance; treat revenue claims with caution.

nationwide.note: Franchising opportunities available across the United States; no state-specific exclusions disclosed.

totalInvestmentMin.note: Entrepreneur lists $236,065-$634,516; third-party aggregators cite a similar $252K-$648K range.

franchiseFee.note: Some aggregators list $35,000; Entrepreneur directory shows $25,000.

adFundPercent.note: Entrepreneur lists 2% ad royalty; other sources cite 4%.

totalUnits.note: Counts vary by source (13-19); Entrepreneur shows 17 units.

isGrowing.note: Actively recruiting franchisees off a small base.

brands.name: Vignette Collection
brands.notes: IHG Hotels & Resorts luxury/lifestyle conversion brand launched in 2021 for high-quality independent hotels. Hotel-scale capital (a full hotel asset), NOT a typical small-unit franchise; IHG does not publicly disclose conventional FDD-style fees here. 34 open hotels (8,708 rooms) plus 45 pipeline hotels as of March 31, 2026.

riskFlags.title: Hotel-scale capital, not a standard franchise
riskFlags.detail: This is a luxury hotel conversion brand under IHG; entry requires owning/operating a full hotel property. Standard franchise metrics (franchise fee, liquid capital, total investment) do not apply in the small-business sense and are not publicly disclosed.

yearFounded.note: Brand launched by IHG in 2021 as a conversion brand.

totalUnits.note: 34 open hotels (8,708 rooms) globally as of March 31, 2026; plus 45 pipeline hotels (6,319 rooms). Global, not US-only.

isGrowing.note: Large pipeline (45 hotels) relative to open count indicates active expansion.

multiUnitAvailable.note: Owners with multiple independent properties can convert.

brands.name: VooDoo Wing Company
brands.notes: Emerging chicken-wing QSR concept founded 2014 (Mobile, AL), franchising since 2021 with fewer than 20 units concentrated in AL plus a Las Vegas location. Small, early-stage system; at least one location (Chapel Hill, NC) is now closed.

riskFlags.title: Closed location
riskFlags.detail: The Chapel Hill, NC VooDoo Wing Company location is listed as permanently closed (Yelp, updated May 2026), a contraction signal for a system with fewer than 20 units.

riskFlags.title: Very small, early-stage system
riskFlags.detail: Approximately 9 units (less than 20) and franchising only since 2021, with units concentrated in Alabama; limited franchisee track record.

nationwide.note: Franchising opportunities listed as available across the United States; existing units are concentrated in Alabama with one in Las Vegas, NV.

totalUnits.note: Entrepreneur shows 9 units; IFPG states 'less than 20 units.'

brands.name: W.O.L.F. Fitness Gyms
brands.notes: Large-format fitness gym franchise (founders took over Brigantine, NJ location 2018; franchising since 2023) with ~6 units. High-capital concept (15,000-30,000 sq ft). Note: Entrepreneur directory shows materially lower investment/fee figures than the franchisor's own site; the official site figures are used as primary.

riskFlags.title: Very new, capital-intensive system
riskFlags.detail: Only ~6 units and franchising since 2023, paired with a high total investment ($834K-$2.19M) and $500K liquid-capital requirement; limited franchisee operating history at significant capital risk.

riskFlags.title: Conflicting published cost figures
riskFlags.detail: Entrepreneur lists franchise fee $35K-$50K and total investment $406K-$1.17M, while the franchisor's own site states a $75K fee and $834K-$2.19M total. Verify directly against the current FDD before relying on either.

nationwide.note: Franchising opportunities listed as available across the United States.

liquidCapitalMin.note: Franchisor site states $500,000 minimum liquid capital.

totalInvestmentMin.note: Franchisor site; Entrepreneur lists a lower $406,150 min.

franchiseFee.note: $75,000 standard; $65,000 for qualified military. Entrepreneur lists $35K-$50K.

adFundPercent.note: 1% brand marketing fund plus required 3% local marketing spend.

minFootprint.note: Primary footprint 15,000-30,000 sq ft; smaller 8,000-12,000 sq ft option for second locations.

sbaApproved.note: Stated as an SBA-approved franchise for qualified applicants.

veteranDiscount.note: $10,000 off franchise fee for qualified military ($65K vs $75K).

brands.name: Wed Society
brands.notes: Wedding-media/advertising and bridal-events franchise; parent founded 2007, began franchising October 2023. Home-based, low-overhead model with one franchisee per metro market; ~5 markets sold out. Item 19 figures published by franchisor.

riskFlags.title: Newly franchising
riskFlags.detail: Although the parent business dates to 2007, franchising only began in October 2023, so the franchised-unit track record is short.

liquidCapitalMin.note: Third-party listing cites $100,000 liquid capital and $200,000 net worth; not confirmed on franchisor site.

avgUnitRevenue.note: Item 19 figure: franchisor states 'average mature market revenue $789,000+ annually'; Entrepreneur separately cites ~$681,156 AUV from four company-owned territories (2023). Represents mature-market gross revenue, not profit.

canRunPartTime.note: Full-time owner-operator; minimum team owner + 1 community manager.

employeesRequired.note: Two employees including the franchisee to start.

veteranDiscount.note: Third-party listing cites $10,000 off franchise fee for veterans; franchisor site instead highlights a $5,000 'Industry Pro' reduction. Treat as unconfirmed.

isGrowing.note: Entered four new markets; some markets sold out (DE, IA, MT, NE, OK).
